meta-description: Learn about state health insurance assistance programs by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: State Health Insurance Assistance Program (SHIP)
excerpt: A state program that gets funding from the federal government to provide free local health coverage counseling to people with Medicare.
meta-title: State Health Insurance Assistance Program (SHIP) - Glossary
content: A state program that gets funding from the federal government to provide free local health coverage counseling to people with Medicare.
